basic_details.job_title: Tea Board India Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Tea Board India Management Trainee Notification 2026 has been released on the official website teaboard.gov.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the Tea Board India Management Trainee Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MBA/PGDM with a specialization in Marketing from a reputed recognized University
qualification.details: MBA/PGDM (Master of Business Administration/Post Graduate Diploma in Management) with a specialization in Marketing from a reputed recognized University.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Tea Board India Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 24-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Tea Board India Management Trainee Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Tea Board India Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: MBA/PGDM (Master of Business Administration/Post Graduate Diploma in Management) with a specialization in Marketing from a reputed recognized University.

content_sections.heading: Tea Board India Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Tea Board India Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 24-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Tea Board India Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Tea Board India Management Trainee recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 24th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Management Trainee post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Management Trainee position by the Tea Board India.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required qualification for the Management Trainee role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBA/PGDM with a specialization in Marketing from a recognized university to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Management Trainee position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 35,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email to the address specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates applying for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Management Trainee posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the Tea Board India located?
faq.answer: The Tea Board India is located in Kolkata, West Bengal, with the pincode 700001.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job offered is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article.
